note: Battle-scene poses v2 — same 10 enemies as enemies-ow-tier-v2, facing/advancing left to match hero-right formation. Solid black bg, painterly, 128x128.

sprites.name: bog_stalker_idle
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of a crouched bog-raider in mud-caked hide and reed wrappings, bone-knife raised mid-stab, body turned and lunging to the left, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, peat brown and moss green palette, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette

sprites.name: slag_rat_idle
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of a small rangy ember rodent, charcoal fur, glowing orange cracks along its spine, molten-tipped tail, body turned and scampering to the left, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, black and ember-orange palette, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette

sprites.name: mire_hulk_idle
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of a tall hunched swamp brute draped in hanging moss and peat, thick matted shoulders, exposed sickly green muscle, body turned and slamming arms forward to the left, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, deep moss-green and muddy brown palette, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette

sprites.name: glacier_wolf_idle
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of a four-legged glacier wolf, thick frost-white fur with pale-blue ice shards along the spine, glowing pale-cyan eyes, body turned and mid-lunge pouncing to the left, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette

sprites.name: ember_golem_idle
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of a hulking stone golem with glowing orange lava cracks across its body, heavy rocky shoulders, body turned and striding to the left with boulder-fist cocked back, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, charcoal and molten orange palette, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette

sprites.name: frost_revenant_idle
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of a gaunt armored revenant, pale-blue ice-crusted plate, tattered frost-cloak, glowing cyan eye-slits, frost-blade raised for a strike, body turned and lunging to the left, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, pale blue and frosted silver palette, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette

sprites.name: mire_warden_idle
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of a tall hooded swamp shaman in layered moss-robes, bone-totem staff thrust forward crackling with sickly green wisps, glowing cyan glyphs on the hem, body turned and casting to the left, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, murky green and sickly cyan palette, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette

sprites.name: magma_behemoth_idle
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of a massive quadrupedal lava beast, obsidian plated hide with deep glowing orange molten seams, flame-maned shoulders, body turned and charging to the left, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, near-black and bright molten orange palette, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette

sprites.name: frost_colossus_idle
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of a towering ice titan built of fused glacial shards, crystalline plated shoulders, massive ice-blade swung overhead, faint pale-cyan glow from within, body turned and advancing to the left, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, pale-blue ice and frost-white palette, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette

sprites.name: ember_lord_idle
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of a regal magma avatar, obsidian armor cracked with blinding orange light, crown of jagged molten spikes, flame-cape trailing, molten-blade extended in a commanding forward thrust, body turned and advancing to the left, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, near-black and blinding molten orange palette, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette
